If such an animal be abandoned or taken to another place, it
would remedy the evil effects of the portents and usher in auspicious
ones, For this purpose the owner should also worship Brahmanas
and cause Japa (silent repetition of Mantras) and Homa (offering
of oblation to the Fire) 10 be performed. The priest should, on this
occasion, offer Caru (cooked rice) and a goat (or some other pre-
scribed animal) to the Sacred Fire to propitiate the Creator, to the
accompaniment of the chanting of hvmns addressed to Prajapatl
(Creator), along with large-scale feedings and generous gifts of
gold.
(9) Portents of the Wind.
